footer.tagline: Guided sea kayaking tours in the Kekova & Kaş region.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Part of Dragoman Turkey — pioneers of sea kayaking on the Kaş and Kekova coast.
about.storyBody: Dragoman SeaKayak was founded in Kaş, Antalya as part of Dragoman Turkey, one of Turkey's most established travel companies. Over the years we have guided hundreds of guests through the enchanting waters of Kekova — paddling over the Sunken City, exploring hidden coves along the Lycian coast, and anchoring in ancient harbors. Our mission has always been the same: to deliver deep, nature-and-history immersion in safe small groups.
about.guidesBody: All of our guides are licensed by the Turkish Ministry of Culture and Tourism. With comprehensive training in sea kayaking technique, first aid, and regional archaeology, our guides deliver a safe and enriching experience for every group. Groups are typically 8–12 people, ensuring personal attention for every guest.
about.safetyBody: All equipment is serviced regularly and meets EU safety standards. Every kayak is supplied with a life jacket, helmet, and dry bag. Routes are updated in real time to match weather conditions — the safety of our guests always comes first.

custom.title: Private & Custom Tours
custom.subtitle: Fully personalised sea kayaking experiences designed around you and your group.
custom.heroSubtitle: From a family holiday to a corporate outing, a romantic getaway to a multi-day expedition — designed for every request.
custom.feature1Body: We design a custom itinerary across the coves of Kekova, Kaş and beyond. Plan your route together with your guide.
custom.feature2Body: The group is yours alone. Your guide dedicates all their expertise and attention to you.
custom.feature3Body: From a day trip to a multi-day expedition, the schedule is yours. Book early to lock in your preferred date.
custom.feature4Body: Suitable for all ages including children. Route and pace adjusted to group size and experience level.
